prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome rebellious fashion editorial poster for RBLN, centered on a full-body streetwear model in front of enormous typography.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, 768 x 1152 style composition, black-and-white with light gray paper background, subtle photocopy grain, worn ink texture, high contrast, underground music zine aesthetic.

Layout: Place one full-body person standing centered, feet near the bottom edge, head overlapping the giant background word. Behind them, fill almost the entire poster height with one huge condensed bold uppercase word: REBELLION. The letters must be black, extremely tall, tightly spaced, distressed, and partially hidden behind the model. Across the lower-middle foreground, overlay a large white hand-painted brush script reading Rebellion, slashing diagonally from bottom left toward right center and covering the model’s legs and torso. Add small editorial microtext around the edges like a magazine cover or streetwear campaign poster.

Subject details: The model is androgynous, standing relaxed with hands in pockets, slightly slouched, facing forward. Use shoulder-length messy wavy blond hair. The face is intentionally obscured by a centered soft gray square blur/mask. Outfit has exactly 8 visible fashion elements: 1 oversized dark distressed graphic T-shirt, 2 layered necklaces with small pendants, 1 baggy dark cargo pant, 1 hanging chain on the right hip, 1 bracelet stack on the wrist, 1 pair of chunky black-and-white sneakers, and 1 small forearm tattoo. Clothing should look worn, rebellious, and urban.

Text content: Include exactly 10 small text blocks/icons around the poster: 1 top-left quote reading “RULES WERE MADE / TO BE BROKEN.”, 1 top-center small globe icon, 1 top-right quote reading “NOT EVERYONE / WAS MEANT TO FIT IN.”, 1 left vertical slogan reading “DISRUPT. DEFY. DEFINE.”, 1 right-side vertical barcode with tiny label text, 1 right vertical slogan reading “BREAK THE PATTERN”, 1 lower-left manifesto block reading “THEY CALL IT CHAOS. / I CALL IT FREEDOM. / I DON’T FOLLOW PATHS. / I LEAVE TRACES. / THIS ISN’T A PHASE. / THIS IS WHO I AM.”, 1 small black label reading “RBLN / WORLDWIDE / 2024”, 1 bottom-right handwritten signature reading Rbln, and 1 bottom-right quote reading “LOUD MINDS. / RAW SOULS. / REAL ONES ONLY.” Add exactly 3 small star/spark icons: one on the left side, one near the right barcode area, and one near the lower bottom center. Add exactly 2 tiny globe icons total: one at the top center and one at the bottom left.

Visual style: Black, white, and gray only; gritty halftone texture; editorial streetwear look; distressed typography; sharp studio lighting with a soft floor shadow; high-fashion poster design; no color accents.

Constraints: Keep all text in English, preserve the huge word and script title as the visual focus, do not add extra people, do not add extra logos beyond the specified RBLN branding, and keep the composition clean but intense.
